stratagem.name: NAUSEATING PAROXYSMS
stratagem.lore: The contagion borne by the Death Guard and their attendant swarms of winged vermin triggers bouts of sickness and convulsion in those they encounter.
stratagem.target: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagem.name: VERMIN CLOUD
stratagem.lore: The storm of insectile contagion sweeps forward, dragging the Death Guard in its wake. None will escape the Plague God’s embrace.
stratagem.target: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagem.name: EYE OF THE SWARM
stratagem.lore: The vermin swarms intensify as the Death Guard close in upon the enemy. As their foes clutch and tear their crawling skin, pitiless Plague Marines unleash volleys of point‑blank fire into their tormented foes.
stratagem.target: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.

stratagem.name: DRONING HORROR
stratagem.lore: Clouds of droning daemon flies sweep across the battlefield to envelop the enemies of the Death Guard. As their victims claw and scratch at the seething swarms, Mortarion’s sons pick off their targets at leisure.
stratagem.target: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within half range, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagem.name: ENERVATING ONSLAUGHT
stratagem.lore: Swathed in a buzzing cloak of pathogenic decay, Nurgle’s chosen crash into the foe, disease dealing death as surely as fist, maul and blade.
stratagem.when: Your Charge phase, just after a Death Guard Infantry unit from your army makes a Charge move.
stratagem.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles ). Roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is not a Cultist or Poxwalker model: for each 5+, the selected enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagem.name: MYPHITIC INVIGORATION
stratagem.lore: Daemon flies are drawn to and invigorated by the foul miasmas surrounding Myphitic Blight‑haulers. In the vicinity of these malodorous constructs, the swarms gather in densities great enough to form a living barrier to the foe’s attacks.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more friendly Myphitic Blight‑hauler units and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
